---
title: "Espacial"
output: html_document
#date: "2023-06-30"
---


### Sensoriamento Remoto

https://rspatial.org/raster/rs/

https://ourcodingclub.github.io/tutorials/spatial/

http://www3.inpe.br/unidades/cep/atividadescep/educasere/apostila.htm

https://rpubs.com/daniballari/RSwithR

https://pt.slideshare.net/vitor_vasconcelos/sensoriamento-remoto-em-r-139540822



### Livros online 

 - Geocomputation with R

https://bookdown.org/robinlovelace/geocompr/
https://geocompx.org/r



- Spatial Data Science
https://r-spatial.org/book/


- Geographic Data Science with R: Visualizing and Analyzing Environmental Change
https://bookdown.org/mcwimberly/gdswr-book/



- R Programming for Climate Data Analysis and Visualization
https://shen.sdsu.edu/pdf/R-TextBySamShen2017.pdf





https://datacarpentry.org/R-ecology-lesson/

https://www.datacamp.com/tutorial/visualizing-climate-change-data-with-ggplot2

https://michaelminn.net/tutorials/r-climate/index.html

https://nordicesmhub.github.io/climate-data-tutorial/04-visualization-R/

https://geospatial-community.netlify.app/post/2022-09-01-analysing-climate-data-with-r/



** R Code for Climate Mathematics

https://rpubs.com/joaquinstawsky/927339

https://rpubs.com/joaquinstawsky/927355
